expectations.text: First skill invoked should be spec-plan with the feature description
expectations.evidence: Step 1 shows: 'Skill: spec-plan, Args: "add a dark mode toggle to the AIForge web app"' as the very first action after pre-flight skip detection.

expectations.text: Skills invoked in order: spec-plan → spec-review → start-phase-plan → pm-db → start-phase-execute
expectations.evidence: Steps 1-5 follow exact sequence: spec-plan (Step 1) → spec-review (Step 2) → start-phase-plan (Step 3) → pm-db (Step 4) → start-phase-execute (Step 5). Each step heading confirms the skill name and order.

expectations.text: Uses start-phase-execute (not start-phase-execute-team) since no --team flag
expectations.evidence: Step 5 explicitly states: 'Mode decision: mode is "auto" (not "team"), so the sequential executor is used.' Invocation shows 'Skill: start-phase-execute' (not team variant). Section 'Mode: Sequential vs Team' confirms no --team flag appended.

expectations.text: Tracks and passes task_list_path from spec-plan output to start-phase-plan and start-phase-execute
expectations.evidence: State Threading Summary table shows task_list_path set in Step 1 and used in Steps 3 and 5. Step 3 shows Args: '/home/artsmc/applications/low-code/job-queue/feature-dark-mode/task-list.md'. Step 5 uses same path. Glob fallback documented.

expectations.text: Mentions recovery commands if any step fails
expectations.evidence: Error Recovery Table lists exact recovery commands for all 5 steps. Each step also has inline failure recovery text (e.g., Step 1: '/spec-plan "add a dark mode toggle..."').

eval_feedback.overall: All assertions pass cleanly with strong evidence. The with-skill trace closely follows the SKILL.md structure.
